metadata.description: Conclave — Scrum for Claude Code teams. Specialized AI subagents for every discipline (Tech Lead, Frontend, Backend, QA, Designer, DevOps) plus optional PM/SM process roles. All artifacts are plain markdown committed to git in a visible conclave/ directory.

plugins.name: conclave
plugins.description: Scrum methodology for distributed engineering teams using Claude Code. Six shipped slash commands (/conclave-init, /conclave-spec, /conclave-planning, /conclave-dev, /conclave-qa, /conclave-pr-review) cover the Day-0 founding-artifacts flow and the per-story delivery loop. Discipline-first roster (Tech Lead, Frontend, Backend, QA, Designer, DevOps) with an explicit solo/team setup. Profile-aware (lean / full-scrum / custom).
